split_policy.dev: next 1/6 of rows by sha256(split_key), within exact.value.component_topology_family
split_policy.test: remaining rows by sha256(split_key), within exact.value.component_topology_family
split_policy.train: first 2/3 of rows by sha256(split_key), within exact.value.component_topology_family

predictors.description: Predicts the most common train target for every row.
Predicts the train majority label for an exact FEN/material feature key, falling back to train-majority.

predictors.control_scope: uses exact metadata fields; interpret as a structured control, not a no-decomposition model
predictors.description: Predicts the train majority label for a component-signature metadata key, falling back to train-majority.
Small deterministic multiclass logistic probe trained on the train split.
Small deterministic multiclass logistic probe trained on the train split.
